description_long: This is a stylized donkey with a light brown body, exaggerated facial features, and a cartoonish appearance. Its large, round eyes are set wide apart, giving it a comical and expressive look, while its snout is broad and slightly squared. The donkey has a short, spiky mane and a dark brown tail with a tuft at the end. A simple brown saddle sits atop its back, with minimal detailing. The legs are thick and end in dark, rounded hooves, and the overall surface appears matte with a slightly rough texture.
description: A cartoonish light brown donkey with a large saddle, big eyes, spiky mane, and dark hooves.
description_view_0: Side view showing the brown saddle, spiky mane, and the full length of the tail.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the large, round eyes, broad snout, and upright ears.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the saddle and tail from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the rounded back, saddle, and the tail's tuft.
attribute_ears: The ears are medium-sized, upright, and pointed, positioned symmetrically on top of the head. They are light brown with slightly darker tips and have a smooth, matte texture.
attribute_tail: The tail is moderately long, thin, and curves slightly downward, ending in a dark, bushy tuft. It is attached at the rear and is dark brown in color.
attribute_hooves: There are four hooves, each rounded and relatively large compared to the legs. They are dark brown, smooth, and lack visible markings or texture.
attribute_mane: The mane is short, spiky, and runs along the top of the neck. It is dark brown, with a rough, jagged appearance and stands upright.
